steps.title: Identify what to find
steps.content: The y-intercept is where the graph crosses the y-axis. This occurs when $x = 0$.

steps.title: Substitute and simplify
steps.content:
When $x = 0$:
$$y = 3(0)^2 + 8(0) + 9$$
$$y = 0 + 0 + 9$$
$$y = 9$$
The y-intercept is $(0, 9)$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
